featureDetection.rationale: Probes for container-option capability in a detached sandbox area to accurately set support labels.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Falling back smoothly to standard scrollIntoView, keeping all modal overlays fully operational.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Highly interactive simulated webpage. Allows users to select items in list fields, open/close overlay modals, and view live scroll-counters.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Superb modal focus trap scroll clearance demo.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Strictly complies with design variables and AA contrast metrics.

references.rationale: Links directly to a related sub-feature at chromestatus.com/feature/5157792380477440.
